title: Production Support Skill
summary: Comprehensive production support workflow for troubleshooting, incident response, and root cause analysis. Integrates local documentation, recent code changes, and team expertise for rapid problem resolution.
author: Platform Engineering
knowledgeGraph:
graph TD
  A[Production Issue] --> B{Search Docs}
  B -->|confluence/jira| C[Local Knowledge]
  A --> D{Analyze Changes}
  D -->|git log| E[Recent PRs]
  A --> F{Check Infrastructure}
  F --> G[Logs & Metrics]
  C --> H[Root Cause]
  E --> H
  G --> H
  H --> I{Severity}
  I -->|P1/P2| J[Page On-Call]
  I -->|P3/P4| K[Handle with Team]
  J --> L[War Room]
  L --> M[Investigation]
  M --> N[Solution]
  N --> O[Documentation]
  O --> P[Postmortem]
  K --> N
